_comment: studio_audit_config.json — thresholds for drift detection. All fields are required.

thresholds._comment: gate_failure_rate: fraction (0.0–1.0) of scanned runs that may be FAILED before flagging drift
repeated_file_modifications: a single file appearing in this many distinct runs triggers a warning
vault_validation_failures: set to 1 to flag any vault validation failure as a violation
missing_manifest_count: runs with no context pack manifest — indicates pipeline was bypassed
tampered_pack_count: runs where verify_manifest detected hash mismatches

auto_ticket._comment: enabled: false disables ticket generation (audit still runs and reports)
prefix: ticket ID prefix for auto-generated remediation tickets (e.g. AUDIT-0001)
